title: Command Line Schema
description: Schema for normalized Volatility cmdline output. Each object represents the command line arguments for a single process.

contains_powershell.description: Whether the command line references PowerShell

contains_cmd.description: Whether the command line references cmd.exe

contains_encoded_command.description: Whether the command line contains -EncodedCommand flag

contains_base64.description: Whether the command line contains Base64-encoded content

contains_url.description: Whether the command line contains a URL
